summary: Admin customers loading state displays correctly with dark authenticated UI theme, proper loading indicators, and expected page structure. The screen successfully implements the loading state contract from the screen spec.

violations.description: Authenticated admin interface uses dark theme with different visual language than public diner aesthetic, creating brand discontinuity between public and logged-in surfaces

actions: Consider implementing consistent brand palette across public and authenticated surfaces to address brand continuity
Verify loading state transitions properly to success/error states as specified
Ensure mobile responsiveness maintains usability at 390px viewport
